texto: The essence of science is that it is always willing to abandon a given idea for a better one
autor: the essence of theology is that it holds its truths to be eternal and immutable.
explicacao: Citação de the essence of theology is that it holds its truths to be eternal and immutable. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The essence of science is that it is always willing to abandon a given idea for a better one” articula reflexao, h-l-mencken, essence em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
